title: Automated Typing of Legacy Software Projects Using Agentic AI
data:

understand and modify. Many are written in dynamically typed languages like

title: RandSet: Randomized Corpus Reduction for Fuzzing Seed Scheduling
data:
Y Xie, K Zhang, Y Liu, R Yang, P Chen, S Wang, D She- arXiv preprint arXiv, 2026
Seed explosion is a fundamental problem in fuzzing seed scheduling, where a fuzzer 
maintains a huge corpus and fails to choose promising seeds. Existing works focus 
on seed prioritization but still suffer from seed explosion since corpus size remains 
huge. We tackle this from a new perspective: corpus reduction, ie, computing a seed 
corpus subset. However, corpus reduction could lead to poor seed diversity and 
large runtime overhead. Prior techniques like cull_queue, AFL-Cmin, and MinSet
Cites: Directed greybox fuzzing
